arts.ttl: Daniel Farke expects huge Leeds United fitness boost as early as next week
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke has confirmed that Junior Firpo is closing in on a return to full team training, with a view to being in contention against Harrogate Town next week. Leeds team news pre-Hull: Junior Firpo update shared

arts.ttl: What Daniel Farke said on Leeds United transfer business, Firpo, Schmidt, injuries and Hull City
arts.sum: Of course, they will be disappointed with the first half of their season but I'm pretty sure they will try to use this home game to win important points. It always helps when you have pretty good results like we have done in the last weeks.

arts.ttl: Crysencio Summerville sent instruction amid West Ham struggles after Leeds United transfer confirmed
arts.sum: It's safe to say Summerville's time at West Ham has been a disappointment so far and ex-Ajax and Borussia Dortmund winger Cedric van der Gun believes that the Dutchman may be struggling physically with the step up to the Premier League this season. Summerville has scored just one goal for West Ham. That came, ironically, during a 2-1 win over Leeds' bitter rivals Manchester United in October.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers social admin sends dig at Leeds United’s Willy Gnonto
arts.sum: At the thick of celebrations when Struijk rolled home the penalty was Willy Gnonto, barging into centre-back Danny Batth in the aftermath as the Leeds players ran away to celebrate. “Danny Batth got the last laugh,” was the humorous caption chosen by the Rovers admin, as Leeds cemented their position top of the league with a three-point gap to second, while the away side dropped out of the top six on goal difference, albeit with a game in-hand.

Hull were denied a point against Middlesbrough in heartbreaking fashion on Wednesday after a 92nd-minute Alex Gilbert goal sealed a 1-0 win for Michael Carrick's side. Saturday's hosts have now drop...
